---
title: "Bessie Annie Pond"
---

## Bessie Annie Pond

**Dates:** (b.1871)

### Description

CMY\'s maid in 1901, see Coleridge, <i>Life</i> 346.

### Biography

She had a younger sister named Edith Pond, who was housemaid to Maurice Yonge at the time of the 1901 census (just after CMY\'s death).  They were the daughters of Francis Pond, cabinet-maker, of Wantage.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th  [1901]
- Letter from Feb 20th [1897]
- Letter from Febry 8th 1897

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
